component.name: SpaceCal for Monado
component.summary: VR Tracking Space Calibrator for Monado/WiVRn

description.p: A GTK4 desktop application for calibrating VR tracking spaces on Linux. Aligns SLAM-tracked (WiVRn/inside-out) and lighthouse-tracked (SteamVR base stations) coordinate spaces.

ul.li: Select source and target tracking devices from categorized dropdowns
Floor calibration using target device Y position
Recenter forward direction and reset tracking origins
Battery status display for all tracked devices
